zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Cradock於1478年出生時，她的父親Sir Mathew Cradock21歲，母親Alice de Maunsell21歲。她於1505年與Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Cradock于1478年出生时，她的父亲Sir Mathew Cradock21岁，母亲Alice de Maunsell21岁。她于1505年与Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cradock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Craddock
meanings: Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Caradawc, Cradawc, Caradoc, Caradog meaning ‘amiable’, familiar in its Latin form Caractacus (but correctly Caratacus, for British Celtic Caratācos, from the stem carat- ‘dear, love’), a British prince who was taken as prisoner to Rome in about 51 AD for his leadership of a revolt against the Roman occupation.
Americanized form of German   Gredig  . Compare   Graddick  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Cradock was born in 1478, her father, Sir Mathew Cradock, was 21 and her mother, Alice de Maunsell, was 21. She married Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas in 1505, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1530, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Cradock est née en 1478, son père, Sir Mathew Cradock, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice de Maunsell, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas en 1505, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1530, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Cradockが1478年に生まれた時，父Sir Mathew Cradockは21歳，母Alice de Maunsellは21歳であった。1505年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンスワンセアでSir Richard Herbert of Ewyasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Cradock(이)가 1478년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Mathew Cradock(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Maunsell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Cradock родилась в 1478 г., её отцу по имени Sir Mathew Cradock было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Maunsell, 21.
